ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Flavii Alexii Ugonii nobilissimi civis Brixiani
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: De maximis Italiae atque Graeciae calamitatibus. Reliqua vide pagina sequenti. Cum privilegiis Principum, et Permissione Catholicae Inquisitione
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The dedication was signed by `Philosophi morales Academiae Venetae`.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
